attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMOFB.BATCH_ID 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_CAPACITY 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_COST 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_RATE 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS 
,SMOFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT 
,SMOFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT 
,SMOFB.ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ASSET_ID 
,SMOFB.BASIC_RATE 
,SMOFB.BONUS_RULE 
,SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
,SMOFB.CAPITALIZE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.CEILING_NAME 
,SMOFB.CONVERSION_DATE 
,SMOFB.COST 
,SMOFB.COST_CHANGE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.DATE_EFFECTIVE 
,SMOFB.DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
,SMOFB.DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE 
,SMOFB.DEPRECIATE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE 
,SMOFB.DEPRN_START_DATE 
,SMOFB.EOFY_ADJ_COST 
,SMOFB.EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.FORMULA_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER 
,SMOFB.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME 
,SMOFB.GROUP_ASSET_ID 
,SMOFB.IDLED_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ITC_AMOUNT 
,SMOFB.ITC_AMOUNT_ID 
,SMOFB.ITC_BASIS 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
,SMOFB.LIFE_IN_MONTHS 
,SMOFB.OLD_ADJUSTED_COST 
,SMOFB.ORIGINAL_COST 
,SMOFB.ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE 
,SMOFB.PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE 
,SMOFB.PRODUCTION_CAPACITY 
,SMOFB.PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE 
,SMOFB.PRORATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.RECOVERABLE_COST 
,SMOFB.REMAINING_LIFE1 
,SMOFB.REMAINING_LIFE2 
,SMOFB.RETIREMENT_ID 
,SMOFB.RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS 
,SMOFB.REVAL_CEILING 
,SMOFB.SALVAGE_VALUE 
,SMOFB.SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG 
,SMOFB.TAX_REQUEST_ID 
,SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN 
,SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT 
,SMOFB.UNIT_OF_MEASURE 
,SMOFB.UNREVALUED_COST 
,SMOFB.CREATE_DATETIME 
,SMOFB.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
		SMFB.BATCH_ID 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_CAPACITY 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_COST 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_RATE 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS 
		,SMFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT 
		,SMFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT 
		,SMFB.ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ASSET_ID 
		,SMFB.BASIC_RATE 
		,SMFB.BONUS_RULE 
		,SMFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
		,SMFB.CAPITALIZE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.CEILING_NAME 
		,SMFB.CONVERSION_DATE 
		,SMFB.COST 
		,SMFB.COST_CHANGE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.DATE_EFFECTIVE 
		,SMFB.DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
		,SMFB.DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE 
		,SMFB.DEPRECIATE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE 
		,SMFB.DEPRN_START_DATE 
		,SMFB.EOFY_ADJ_COST 
		,SMFB.EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.FORMULA_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER 
		,SMFB.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_NAME 
		,SMFB.GROUP_ASSET_ID 
		,SMFB.IDLED_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ITC_AMOUNT 
		,SMFB.ITC_AMOUNT_ID 
		,SMFB.ITC_BASIS 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
		,SMFB.LIFE_IN_MONTHS 
		,SMFB.OLD_ADJUSTED_COST 
		,SMFB.ORIGINAL_COST 
		,SMFB.ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE 
		,SMFB.PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE 
		,SMFB.PRODUCTION_CAPACITY 
		,SMFB.PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE 
		,SMFB.PRORATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.RECOVERABLE_COST 
		,SMFB.REMAINING_LIFE1 
		,SMFB.REMAINING_LIFE2 
		,SMFB.RETIREMENT_ID 
		,SMFB.RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS 
		,SMFB.REVAL_CEILING 
		,SMFB.SALVAGE_VALUE 
		,SMFB.SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG 
		,SMFB.TAX_REQUEST_ID 
		,SMFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN 
		,SMFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT 
		,SMFB.UNIT_OF_MEASURE 
		,SMFB.UNREVALUED_COST 
		,SMFB.CREATE_DATETIME 
		,SMFB.ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_BOOKS  SMFB WHERE DATE_INEFFECTIVE is NULL
	) SMOFB 
		INNER JOIN 	$$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC
			ON (SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
				AND SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME
				AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
				) 
	WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	( select 1 from $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET  WFA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	    WHERE WFA.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	    and SMOFB.ASSET_ID= WFA.SK_ASSET_ID_INT
	    and  SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	)

SELECT   
EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NGLAAK.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS  BK_COMPANY_CD 
,EFAB.SERIAL_NUMBER AS SERIAL_NUM
,COALESCE(NCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS RU_OWNER_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY 
,EFAB.TAG_NUMBER AS FA_TAG_NUM
,EFAB.MODEL_NUMBER AS MODEL_NUM
,EFAT.DESCRIPTION AS ASSET_DESCR
,ST.DV_CONVERSION_DATE AS ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT,
CASE
                WHEN A.FEEDERSYSTEM > 1 AND  EFCB.SEGMENT1 IN ('INT', 'DEMO', 'DPOT') THEN  'Y'  --> No Book Type
                WHEN A.FEEDERSYSTEM = 1 AND FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IS NULL THEN  'X' 
                 WHEN A.FEEDERSYSTEM = 0  AND  EFCB.SEGMENT1 IN ('INT', 'DEMO', 'DPOT') THEN  'Y'  --No Booktype
                WHEN   A.FEEDERSYSTEM = 1  AND  FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IS  NOT NULL AND EFAI.FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IN ('IDE ORDERS', 'CG1 INTERNAL ORDERS') THEN  'Y'
                WHEN  A.FEEDERSYSTEM = 1   AND  FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IS  NOT NULL AND EFAI.FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IN ('ORACLE PAYABLES', 'SJ ORACLE PAYABLES') THEN  'N'
                WHEN  A.FEEDERSYSTEM = 1  AND  FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME IS  NOT NULL AND   EFCB.SEGMENT1 IN ('INT', 'DEMO', 'DPOT')  THEN  'Y' --> ADD BOOK TYPE CODE CONDITION HERE
                ELSE    'N'            
END AS  INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE							

,CASE WHEN NCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS  OWNER_ROLE
,ST.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE AS DEPRECIATION_METHOD_CD
,ST.LIFE_IN_MONTHS  AS ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT
,ST.DV_DEPRN_START_DATE AS ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT
,ST.DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS  ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT
,CAST(ST.ORIGINAL_COST  AS DECIMAL(26,7) )  AS  ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,CAST ( (  CAST(ST.ORIGINAL_COST AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) * NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) )   AS   ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT   
,CAST( ST.COST AS DECIMAL(26,7) )  AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,CAST( ( CAST (ST.COST AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *  NCCDR1.PL_CONVERSION_RATE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)  ) AS CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT 
 ,ST.REMAINING_LIFE1 AS REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT
,CAST (0 AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS NET_DEPRECIATION_AMT 
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
,EFAB.ASSET_ID  AS SK_ASSET_ID_INT 
,NFAB.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD AS BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
,NFAC.BK_ASSET_SUBCATEGORY_CD AS BK_ASSET_SUBCATEGORY_CD
,NFAC.BK_ASSET_CATEGORY_CD AS BK_ASSET_CATEGORY_CD
,NFAT.BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD  AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD
,EFAB.CURRENT_UNITS AS RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY
,NGLAAK.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS ASSET_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY
,COALESCE( NGLATK.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = 'MFG' THEN -999
WHEN  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = 'EMEA' THEN -998 
WHEN   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = 'BV' THEN -997
WHEN   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = 'QTC' THEN -996
                       end ) AS CIP_TARGET_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY
,NGLAEK.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY
,ST.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FIXED_ASSET_EFFECTIVE_DTM
,ST.DATE_INEFFECTIVE AS FIXED_ASSET_INEFFECTIVE_DTM  ,
CASE WHEN INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE  = 'Y' THEN COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999)  ELSE -999 END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
EFAB.ATTRIBUTE10  AS  RU_BK_DEAL_ID ,
EFAB.ATTRIBUTE11 AS RU_ON_PREMISE_FLG ,
EFAB.ATTRIBUTE12 AS RU_REVENUE_PROGRAM_NAME,
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM                
                (
                SELECT
                                                BATCH_ID,
                                                'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
                                                ACTION_CODE,
                                                ASSET_ID,
                                                GLOBAL_NAME,
                                                BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
                                                LIFE_IN_MONTHS,
                                                ORIGINAL_COST,
                                                COST,
                                                REMAINING_LIFE1,
                                                TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,
                                                CAST(DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS DATE) AS  DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE,
                                                CAST(DEPRN_START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_DEPRN_START_DATE ,
                                                CAST(CONVERSION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CONVERSION_DATE,
                                                DEPRN_METHOD_CODE,
                                                CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                DATE_EFFECTIVE,
                                                CAST(DATE_EFFECTIVE AS DATE) AS DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE,
                                                GES_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
                FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_BOOKS  WHERE  DATE_INEFFECTIVE IS NULL 
                    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BOOK_TYPE_CODE,ASSET_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
               ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC ) = 1 /* ADDED PARTITION TO RESOLVE DUPLICATE ISSUE FOR SOURCE RECORDS*/
                
                UNION ALL
                SELECT
                                                BATCH_ID,
                                                'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
                                                ACTION_CODE,
                                                ASSET_ID,
                                                GLOBAL_NAME,
                                                BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
                                                LIFE_IN_MONTHS,
                                                ORIGINAL_COST,
                                                COST,
                                                REMAINING_LIFE1,
                                                TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,
                                                CAST(DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS DATE) AS  DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE,
                                                CAST(DEPRN_START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_DEPRN_START_DATE ,
                                                CAST(CONVERSION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CONVERSION_DATE,
                                                DEPRN_METHOD_CODE,
                                                CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                DATE_EFFECTIVE,
                                                CAST(DATE_EFFECTIVE AS DATE) DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE,
                                                GES_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
                                                CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE                         ,
                                                DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
                FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_BOOKS
                WHERE DATE_INEFFECTIVE IS NULL 
                ) ST
                                                INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB 
                                                                ON (EFAB.ASSET_ID=ST.ASSET_ID AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME=ST.GLOBAL_NAME               
                                                                )   
                                                
	                                               LEFT  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ASSET_INVOICES EFAI 
                                                                ON (EFAB.ASSET_ID=EFAI.ASSET_ID AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME  = EFAI.GLOBAL_NAME)    


                                                LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSO
                                                                  ON EFAB.ATTRIBUTE14=CAST(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(30))
                                                
                                                INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFBC
                                                                ON ( ST.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = EFBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE  AND  ST.GLOBAL_NAME = EFBC.GLOBAL_NAME 
                                                                                                AND       EFBC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE')  
                
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_CATEGORY_BOOKS  EFACB        
                                ON (ST.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = EFACB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
                                                AND  EFAB.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID = EFACB.CATEGORY_ID
                                                AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = EFACB.GLOBAL_NAME  )

INNER JOIN        $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_TL EFAT    
                                ON (EFAB.ASSET_ID=EFAT.ASSET_ID 
                                                                AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME=EFAT.GLOBAL_NAME 
                                                 ) 

INNER JOIN        $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST.GLOBAL_NAME

INNER JOIN (SELECT CATEGORY_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,SEGMENT1,SEGMENT2 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_CATEGORIES_B WHERE  DATE_INEFFECTIVE  IS NULL
            )EFCB 
                ON(EFCB.CATEGORY_ID = EFAB.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID   
                                                AND EFCB.GLOBAL_NAME =EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME  ) 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_CATEGORY NFAC  
                ON (EFCB.SEGMENT1= NFAC.BK_ASSET_CATEGORY_CD   
                                AND EFCB.SEGMENT2 = NFAC.BK_ASSET_SUBCATEGORY_CD) 
                                  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE NFAT 
                ON (NFAT.BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD=EFAB.ASSET_TYPE)  
 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_BOOK_TYPE NFAB
                ON(NFAB.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD  = EFBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
                                                AND FA_BOOK_CLASS_CD= 'CORPORATE')
                
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON (EFBC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
                                                AND   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE)
                                                                                                                                                                                                        
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLAAK
ON(EFACB.ASSET_COST_ACCOUNT_CCID = NGLAAK.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT 
 AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLAAK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON ( NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE =NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
 AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'  AND
NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=ST.DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE )  
 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR1
ON ( NCCDR1.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
 AND NCCDR1.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' 
 AND       NCCDR1.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=ST.DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE )

INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT ASSET_ID,DISTRIBUTION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,CODE_COMBINATION_ID,ASSIGNED_TO,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,DATE_INEFFECTIVE
FROM                  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_DIST_HISTORY 
 WHERE DATE_INEFFECTIVE IS NULL 
AND       (ASSET_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,DISTRIBUTION_ID ) IN 
(SELECT ASSET_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,MAX(DISTRIBUTION_ID) FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_DIST_HISTORY 
WHERE DATE_INEFFECTIVE IS NULL  GROUP BY 1,2) 
 ) EFDH
ON(ST.ASSET_ID = EFDH.ASSET_ID 
 AND ST.GLOBAL_NAME=EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLAEK
ON ( NGLAEK.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT = EFDH.CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
AND NGLAEK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
 
LEFT  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLATK
ON (NGLATK.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT =EFACB.WIP_COST_ACCOUNT_CCID 
AND NGLATK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)  
 
LEFT  JOIN   
                (SELECT  EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY  
                                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF, $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID  = EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER
                AND         NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TYPE <>'APPL' 
                ) NCWPKEY
ON(NCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=EFDH.ASSIGNED_TO  AND NCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME)

INNER JOIN
(
SELECT 
EFAB1.ASSET_NUMBER AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
EFAB1.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME1,
COUNT(DISTINCT EFAI1.FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME) FEEDERSYSTEM
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB1 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ASSET_INVOICES EFAI1
ON (EFAB1.ASSET_ID=EFAI1.ASSET_ID AND
EFAB1.GLOBAL_NAME=EFAI1.GLOBAL_NAME)
GROUP BY 1,2)  A
ON A.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AND A.GLOBAL_NAME1= EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME
AND  INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE <> 'X'

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY  BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
GLOBAL_NAME1,INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE
               ORDER BY BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM DESC ) = 1
